_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Sydney Spine: multi-location intercept for city/Double Bay references, booking routes to book_intent, info routes silently.

scenarios.name: City location inquiry triggers multi-location intercept
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says exactly 'I can only help with bookings for Pagewood. For the City or Double Bay clinic they can book online at sydney spine dot com dot au. Would you like to book at Pagewood instead?' and halts without a tool call. FAIL if agent routes to book_intent or info_pivot without the intercept.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to book_intent with polite ack

history.content: I'd like to make an appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one polite ack ('Lovely!' / 'Wonderful!') then calls universal_router intent='book_intent'. FAIL if agent asks which location or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output. FAIL if agent answers the parking question inline.
